title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 409.816 - Applicability of other laws
text:
409.816.  Applicability of other laws. — Nothing in sections 409.800 to 409.863 shall impair, derogate or otherwise affect the authority or powers of the commissioner under this chapter or the application of any provision of this chapter to any person or transaction subject thereto.
(L. 1985 H.B. 409 & 532 § 7)
